about.title: About me
about.intro: Hi, I'm Rizalde, a front-end development student at NAIT in Edmonton, Alberta.
about.toolsIntro: My primary tools of choice include:
about.passion: Beyond coding, I'm passionate about UX/UI design, visual design, and creating engaging user experiences. I enjoy working at the intersection of design and development.
about.approach: I focus on building clean, user-friendly interfaces. My goal is to become a designer who understands code well enough to collaborate effectively with developers.
